## dots.tts Models (Quick Reference)

| Model | Recommended Steps (NFE) | CFG / Guidance Scale | Primary Use Case |
|---------|-----------------------|----------------------|------------------|
| **dots.tts-base** | 10–32 | 1.2 (adjustable) | Fine-tuning, research, full quality/latency control |
| **dots.tts-soar** | 10–32 | 1.2 (adjustable) | Highest-quality zero-shot voice cloning, best speaker similarity |
| **dots.tts-mf** | 4 | 0 | Low-latency production inference |

### Simple Recommendation

- **Quality first** → `dots.tts-soar`
- **Speed first** → `dots.tts-mf`
- **Training / fine-tuning** → `dots.tts-base`

## Dots-TTS-ComfyUI Model Requirements

**VRAM:** Recommended BF16 usage is roughly **8-16 GB VRAM** depending on the selected model, text length, voice cloning references, generation length, attention backend, and other loaded models.

Dots-TTS-ComfyUI includes **AIMDO / ComfyUI model-management integration** 

## Models

### dotstts

**Official FP32 Models**

- 🤗 [rednote-hilab/dots.tts-base](https://huggingface.co/rednote-hilab/dots.tts-base)
- 🤗 [rednote-hilab/dots.tts-soar](https://huggingface.co/rednote-hilab/dots.tts-soar)
- 🤗 [rednote-hilab/dots.tts-mf](https://huggingface.co/rednote-hilab/dots.tts-mf)

**BF16 Models**

- 🤗 [drbaph/dots.tts-base-bf16](https://huggingface.co/drbaph/dots.tts-base-bf16)
- 🤗 [drbaph/dots.tts-soar-bf16](https://huggingface.co/drbaph/dots.tts-soar-bf16)
- 🤗 [drbaph/dots.tts-mf-bf16](https://huggingface.co/drbaph/dots.tts-mf-bf16)

### dotstts/common

Shared assets required by all model variants:

- 🤗 [drbaph/dots.tts-common](https://huggingface.co/drbaph/dots.tts-common)
  - `speaker_encoder.safetensors`
  - `vocoder.safetensors`

### audio_encoders (Optional Whisper Transcription Node)

- 🤗 [openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo](https://huggingface.co/openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo) *(recommended)*
- 🤗 [openai/whisper-large-v3](https://huggingface.co/openai/whisper-large-v3)
- 🤗 [openai/whisper-medium](https://huggingface.co/openai/whisper-medium)
- 🤗 [openai/whisper-small](https://huggingface.co/openai/whisper-small)
- 🤗 [openai/whisper-tiny](https://huggingface.co/openai/whisper-tiny)

## Model Storage Location

```text
ComfyUI/
└── models/
    ├── dotstts/
    │   ├── common/
    │   │   ├── speaker_encoder.safetensors
    │   │   └── vocoder.safetensors
    │   ├── dots.tts-base/
    │   │   └── model.safetensors
    │   ├── dots.tts-soar/
    │   │   └── model.safetensors
    │   ├── dots.tts-mf/
    │   │   └── model.safetensors
    │   ├── dots.tts-base-bf16/
    │   │   └── dots.tts-base-bf16.safetensors
    │   ├── dots.tts-soar-bf16/
    │   │   └── dots.tts-soar-bf16.safetensors
    │   └── dots.tts-mf-bf16/
    │       └── dots.tts-mf-bf16.safetensors
    └── audio_encoders/
        ├── openai_whisper-large-v3-turbo/
        ├── openai_whisper-large-v3/
        ├── openai_whisper-medium/
        ├── openai_whisper-small/
        └── openai_whisper-tiny/
```


### BF16 variants automatically use the matching source-model assets. Shared heavy files are stored only once under:

```text
ComfyUI/models/dotstts/common/
```

If `download_if_missing` is enabled, missing assets are downloaded automatically.
